warnings: This sheet's single-line diagram is fully legible with all 12 positions clearly labeled (6 populated + 6 spare 'ว่าง') -- unlike house #4's equivalent EE-02 sheet, which had one illegible position number between 4 and 6; no such gap here.

Main breaker (80AT,2P IC10kA) and meter (30(100)A) are larger-rated than house #4's equivalent sheet (50AT,2P / 15(45)A) -- consistent with this being a larger house (per the grid master file, this house's footprint/floor area is larger than houses #2-#4).
Panel has 6 spare positions (7-12) vs house #4's 4 spare positions (7-10) -- this panel has 12 total slots vs house #4's 10.

Two water-heater junction-box circuits (positions 5-6, RCBO 20AT) match the pattern seen in house #4's equivalent sheet -- likely one per bathroom, not independently cross-verified against a bathroom count on this page alone.
